sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Key nodes:")
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] in ('B', 'c', 'Y') and node['pixels'] > 5:
        b = node['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  {node['color']}: pixels={node['pixels']}, bbox=[{min(rows)},{min(cols)}]-[{max(rows)},{max(cols)}]")

# Count dots
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
white_count = 0
yellow_dot_count = 0
for r in range(44, 56):
    for c in range(40, 62):
        ch = ascii_lines[r][c]
        if ch == 'W':
            white_count += 1
        elif ch == 'Y':
            yellow_dot_count += 1
print(f"\nWhite dots: {white_count}, Yellow cells: {yellow_dot_count}")

# Show shape region
print("\nShape region (cols 48-62):")
for r in range(44, 56):
    line = ascii_lines[r][48:62]
    if 'W' in line or 'Y' in line:
        print(f"  Row {r}: '{line}'")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
